metadata_details.purpose: Parser for Aruba Clearpass logs using the OCSF mapping to normalise events into the AI-SIEM schema.
metadata_details.dependency_summary: Requires ingestion of the original Aruba Clearpass logs.
metadata_details.performance_impact: Minimal – this parser is a placeholder pointing to the upstream definition.
metadata_details.author: Joel Mora

analysis.semantic_summary: Parser configuration for Aruba ClearPass security logs handling multiple log types including authentication sessions, system events, audit records, and RADIUS logs. Implements standardized timestamp parsing and IPv4 extraction with OCSF field mapping for security event normalization.
optimization_opportunities: Consolidate similar format patterns using shared regex components
Implement caching for frequently used pattern matching
Add validation for expected field values
Include error handling for malformed logs
analysis.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: aruba_clearpass_logs-latest 
-- OCSF Class: Authentication (3002)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T10:59:49.804704

-- Pre-compile patterns for performance
local patterns = {
    timestamp = "^(%d%d%d%d%-%d%d%-%d%d %d%d:%d%d:%d%d),%d+",
    ipv4 = "(%d+%.%d+%.%d+%.%d+)",
    details = "([^,]+)=([^,]+)"
}

-- Cached functions for performance
local match = string.match
local gmatch = string.gmatch
local format = string.format
local time = os.time
local type = type
local pairs = pairs

function transform(record)
    -- Input validation with early return
    if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
        return nil, "Invalid input record"
    end

    -- Initialize OCSF-compliant output with local vars
    local output = {
        class_uid = 3002,
        class_name = "Authentication", 
        category_uid = 3,
        category_name = "Identity & Access Management",
        activity_id = 1,
        type_uid = 300201,
        metadata = {
            product = {
                name = "ClearPass",
                vendor = "Aruba Networks"
            },
            version = "1.0"
        }
    }

    -- Extract timestamp with error handling
    local timestamp = record.timestamp
    if timestamp then
        local ts = match(timestamp, patterns.timestamp)
        if ts then
            output.time = ts
        end
    end
    
    -- Extract source IP with validation
    local ip = record.ip
    if ip then
        local valid_ip = match(ip, patterns.ipv4)
        if valid_ip then
            output.src = {
                ip = valid_ip,
                type = "ipv4"
            }
        end
    end

    -- Parse details into event params
    if record.details then
        local params = {}
        for k, v in gmatch(record.details, patterns.details) do
            if k and v then
                params[k] = v
            end
        end
        if next(params) then
            output.event = {
                params = params
            }
        end
    end

    -- Validation and cleanup
    if not output.time then
        output.time = time() * 1000 -- Default to current time in ms
    end

    -- Final validation of required fields
    if not output.class_uid or output.class_uid == 0 then
        return nil, "Invalid class_uid"
    end

    return output
end

-- Error handler wrapper
function safe_transform(record)
    local success, result = pcall(transform, record)
    if not success then
        return nil, format("Transform error: %s", result)
    end
    return result
end

-- Cache cleanup
local function cleanup()
    patterns = nil
    collectgarbage()
end

test_cases.expected: Valid OCSF output with all fields
